message:
fix(fcp): pass websocket context to close and fix sendgrid imports

- websocket.rs: WsTransport::close() now passes websocket_cx() context
  to socket.close(), matching the updated websocket API contract
- sendgrid_compliance_e2e.rs: add missing OperationId import and
  reformat import block for fcp_core types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
